name: sysExec, sysExecCmd
title: sysExec, sysExecCmd
syntax: long sysExec(char cmd[], char params[]); // form 1
long sysExec(char cmd[], char params[], char directory[]); // form 2
long sysExecCmd(char cmd[], char params[]); // from 1
long sysExecCmd(char cmd[], char params[], char directory[]); // form 2
description: Executes an external command. Does not wait until the command has completed its execution.
sysExec must be given an executable; sysExecCmd calls cmd.EXE /K with the first parameter, which opens a command window where the command is executed as if it was entered directly.

parameters.name: cmd
parameters.description: The command to be executed. Either the full absolute path or a path relative to the current working directory must be given or the command must be in the system path.

parameters.name: params
parameters.description: Parameters to the command. A parameter which contains spaces must be enclosed in " ".

parameters.name: directory (Form 2)
parameters.description: Working directory for the command. Either an absolute path or a path relative to the current working directory must be given.

return: 1 if the command was successfully started, else 0.

description: If the working directory of CANoe is not the same as the directory of a called program, the path for this program must be given in the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
